description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a hip roof covered in dark gray tiles. The front facade features large, vertically aligned windows and a prominent central section that projects outward, flanked by a covered balcony on one side. The exterior walls are finished in light-colored brick or siding, contrasted by dark window frames and a darker base trim. The rear of the house includes a wide covered patio area supported by columns, and the side elevations have a simpler arrangement with fewer windows. The roof has a single chimney and multiple intersecting planes, giving it a dynamic, contemporary appearance. The overall design is clean and geometric, with an emphasis on large glass surfaces and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a hip roof, large vertical windows, and a mix of light and dark exterior finishes. Features include a covered balcony, wide patio, and a prominent central facade.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large vertical windows, and a covered balcony on the left.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the intersecting hip roof planes and minimal window arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view with a wide covered patio, simple window layout, and supporting columns.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the balcony extension and a few windows, with the roof's geometry visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large vertical windows on the front
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with large glass panels, covered balcony, and minimal decorative elements
